security.title: Security
security.password_reset_description: Send yourself a password reset link by email
security.reset_info: Password changes are done via the secure email reset process. You will be logged out and redirected to the password reset page.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Customize appearance
appearance.color_mode_hint: You can also toggle the color mode anytime via the icon in the toolbar.
appearance.language_hint: Changes the UI language immediately. The profile language preference is saved separately.
